text.title: Server Init Bootstrap Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding the Server Init Bootstrap methodology. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: Phase order is fixed: (1) create user, (2) install operator pubkey, (3) verify login as user in a second terminal, (4) disable root + password auth. NEVER disable root before step 3 succeeds.
rule.rationale: A typo in sshd_config that survives the operator session locks the host. Verification in a second terminal catches it.

rule.statement: User systemd services REQUIRE `loginctl enable-linger <user>` so they survive logout. Without it, services die at logout.
rule.rationale: systemd user manager is bound to active sessions by default; lingering is the explicit opt-in.

rule.statement: fail2ban + UFW MUST be active before any service is bound to the public interface; the SSH brute-force window opens at first boot.
rule.rationale: Botnets scan IPv4 within minutes of allocation; an unprotected sshd on a fresh host is hit immediately.

rule.statement: Hostname MUST match the operator's naming convention (e.g. faion-net-01) — not `ubuntu` or `localhost`. Set via `hostnamectl set-hostname` AND /etc/hosts.
rule.rationale: Default hostnames break mail (HELO), monitoring grouping, and SSH-config Host blocks.

rule.statement: cloud-init user-data MUST be idempotent — re-running it on a half-bootstrapped host must converge, not error.
rule.rationale: Bootstrap interruptions happen (network, power); re-runs are the recovery path.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do not run this methodology — route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent's context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above when complexity is light), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-server-init-bootstrap.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
